

---

# 📊 UPDATED EXPORT & REPORTING MODULE (Advanced Version)

---

# 1️⃣ MASTER SUMMARY REQUIREMENT (Very Important)

Every export document (Excel or PDF) must include:

At the top of the document:


* Report Title
* Date & Time Generated
* Generated By (Logged-in user name)
* Total Employees
* Total Rooms
* Occupied Rooms
* Available Rooms

This applies to:

* Employee Export
* Room Export
* QR Export

---

# 2️⃣ EMPLOYEE EXPORT (Updated)

## 📄 Excel Format

### Header Section (Top of Sheet)

Example:


Report Title: Employee Accommodation Report
Generated By: Admin User
Generated On: 03 March 2026
Total Employees: 250
Total Rooms: 45
Occupied Rooms: 40
Available Rooms: 5

---

### Employee Table

| Employee ID | Name | Iqama | Mobile | Department | Company | Room No | Room Building | Status |

At bottom:

Total Employees: 250

---

## 📑 Employee PDF Format

PDF should include:


✔ Report Summary Section
✔ Table with employee details
✔ Page numbers
✔ Footer with system name

---

# 3️⃣ ROOM EXPORT (Major Update)

Now when exporting room report, it must include:

### Room Details

AND

### Employee Details inside each room

---

## 📄 Room Excel Format (Detailed Version)

Top Summary:

* Total Rooms
* Total Employees
* Occupied Rooms
* Available Rooms

---

Then structured like this:

---

### Room 101

Building: A
Floor: 1
Capacity: 4
Occupied: 3

Employees in Room:

| Employee ID | Name | Department | Company | Status |

---

### Room 102

Building: A
Floor: 1
Capacity: 4
Occupied: 4

Employees in Room:

| Employee ID | Name | Department | Company | Status |

---

This continues for all rooms.

---

## 📑 Room PDF Format (Professional Layout)

PDF Layout:

---

ROOM NO: 101
Building: A
Floor: 1
Capacity: 4
Occupied: 3
-----------

Employee List:

• Ahmed Ali – ID: 1001 – Maintenance
• Khalid Noor – ID: 1002 – Electrical
• Farhan – ID: 1003 – Civil

---

Then next room...

---

⚠ If room is empty, show:

"No employees assigned to this room."

---

# 4️⃣ QR EXPORT (With Summary)

If exporting QR document:

Top Section Must Show:

Total Rooms
Total Employees
Generated Date

Then QR Layout:

Room 101
[ QR Image ]

Room 102
[ QR Image ]

---

# 5️⃣ FILTERED EXPORT SUPPORT

System must support:

Export Based On:

* Selected Room
* Selected Building
* Selected Department
* Selected Company
* Selected Date Range (optional)

When exporting filtered data:

Summary must reflect filtered totals only.

Example:
If exporting only Building A:

Total Rooms (Building A): 20
Total Employees (Building A): 120

---

# 6️⃣ TECHNICAL IMPLEMENTATION (Laravel)

Your developer must:

### For Room Export:

Use Eager Loading:

```php
Room::with('employees')->get();
```

This ensures each room loads its employees.

---

### For Summary Calculation:

```php
$totalEmployees = Employee::count();
$totalRooms = Room::count();
$occupiedRooms = Room::whereHas('employees')->count();
$availableRooms = Room::whereDoesntHave('employees')->count();
```

---

# 7️⃣ PERFORMANCE NOTE (Important)

If you have:

* 100–500 employees → normal export OK
* 1000+ employees → must use Laravel Queue
* 3000+ employees → chunk processing recommended

---
